sections.paragraph:
Original: מּקוא מקוה מקוה o

Transliteration: miqveh miqvêh miqvê'

Phonetic: mik-veh'

BDB Definition:

  1. hope
    1. hope
    2. ground of hope
    3. things hoped for, outcome
  2. collection, collected mass

Origin: from H6960

TWOT entry: 1994c,1995a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
